positive: Minimalist geometric cat silhouette lounging on a stylized crescent moon, surrounded by a halo of abstract constellations and swirling nebulae. The design uses negative space effectively, featuring crisp, thick outlines and solid, flat areas of color. Color palette is limited to deep indigo, cosmic teal, and stark white. High contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Clean vector aesthetic, intricate linework, celestial atmosphere, elegant and stylized, centered composition. UHD, graphic design, sticker art, t-shirt graphic.
negative: blurry, poor composition, low contrast, text, writing, signature, watermark, logo, messy, noise, artifacts, fuzzy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, human, celebrity, realistic photography
